I now put a stop to all patterns of breaking away in my bloodline. I take authority over the pathways or separate from families and religion. I put a roadblock against all runaways, children, adults, and parents.

I come against all running away to the married, to the armed services, to joining forces with religious cults. I dissolved all roots of isolation, hiding, and escaping.

Father, encircle my family tree with Your loving, forgiving heart. code into my heritage a pattern of relating in a healthy community. let them draw together. Let us be people who are open and able to relate in class and loving ways.
